objective: Add module-level docstrings to glitchlab/display.py, glitchlab/controller_utils.py, and glitchlab/doc_inserter.py explaining what each module does, its public API, and how it fits into the controller decomposition. Keep docstrings concise — 3-5 lines max per module.

plan_steps.description: Add a module-level docstring to glitchlab/display.py explaining its role in UI/console output for the controller.
plan_steps.code_hint:
"""
Handles console output and rich UI formatting for the GlitchLab controller.
Public API includes functions for rendering status, errors, and agent progress.
Fits into the controller decomposition by abstracting all display logic away from core execution.
"""

plan_steps.description: Add a module-level docstring to glitchlab/controller_utils.py explaining its utility functions.
plan_steps.code_hint:
"""
Provides utility functions and helpers for the main GlitchLab controller.
Public API includes shared routines for state management and configuration parsing.
Fits into the controller decomposition by extracting reusable logic to keep the main controller lean.
"""

plan_steps.description: Add a module-level docstring to glitchlab/doc_inserter.py explaining its role in documentation injection.
plan_steps.code_hint:
"""
Manages the injection of documentation and context into files or agent prompts.
Public API includes methods for parsing and inserting docstrings or comments.
Fits into the controller decomposition by handling source code modification tasks independently.
"""

commit_message: docs: add module-level docstrings to controller decomposition modules
implementation_summary: Added module-level docstrings to `glitchlab/display.py`, `glitchlab/controller_utils.py`, and `glitchlab/doc_inserter.py` explaining their roles, public APIs, and how they fit into the controller decomposition.
changelog_entry:
### Added
- **Module Documentation**: Added module-level docstrings to `glitchlab/display.py`, `glitchlab/controller_utils.py`, and `glitchlab/doc_inserter.py` to improve codebase maintainability and explain the role of each module in the controller decomposition.

data.description: Verifies that glitchlab.display, glitchlab.controller_utils, and glitchlab.doc_inserter have module-level docstrings explaining their roles, public APIs, and controller decomposition, within the 3-5 lines limit.
